source: Official FIFA/Coca-Cola Men's World Ranking, 11 June 2026 edition (via en.wikipedia.org/wiki/FIFA_Men's_World_Ranking).
_comment: Current-ranking snapshot appended to the historical ranking time series so 2026 predictions use up-to-date FIFA points. Verified points are included for the WC-2026 teams ranked in the official top 20 (the title favourites, where freshness matters most). The remaining WC teams are NOT listed here; core.ranking.load_rankings concatenates this snapshot with the 1992->2024 history feed, so any team absent here falls back to its latest available historical ranking (Sept 2024) via points_as_of. Points use FIFA's post-2018 (Elo-based) method. Public factual data; see DATA_SOURCES.md.
